ddls:
CREATE TABLE "desserts" (
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dessert product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dessert */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the dessert */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of dessert */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Calories per 100g serving */,
  "fat_g" REAL /* Fat content per 100g serving in grams */,
  "carbs_g" INTEGER /* Carbohydrate content per 100g serving in grams */,
  "protein_g" REAL /* Protein content per 100g serving in grams */,
  "serving_size_g" INTEGER /* Serving size in grams for the nutritional information */,
  "sugar_g" REAL /* Sugar content per 100g serving in grams */,
  "fiber_g" REAL /* Fiber content per 100g serving in grams */,
  "sodium_mg" INTEGER /* Sodium content per 100g serving in milligrams */,
  "allergens" TEXT /* List of allergens present in the dessert */,
  "ingredients" TEXT /* List of main ingredients of the dessert */,
  "market_launch_date" TEXT /* Date the dessert was launched in the market */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dessert (e.g., Active, Discontinued) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dessert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dessert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_desserts_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_desserts_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES dessert_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL for the brand's logo */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Short tagline or slogan for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dessert_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of dessert */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of dessert */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the type of dessert */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the dessert type is organic */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the dessert type is gluten-free */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the dessert type is vegan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_development" (
  "development_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each development process */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert being developed */,
  "development_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of development (e.g., Idea, Testing, Finalization) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the development process */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the development process */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the development process (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the development process */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* List of key milestones in the development process */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_development_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_development_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "developer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the developer belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the developer within the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the developer */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the developer's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control test */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch being tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was conducted */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of quality control test (e.g., Nutritional Analysis, Taste Test) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the test */,
  "test_result_details" TEXT /* Detailed results of the test */,
  "test_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the test */,
  "retest_date" TEXT /* Date for any retests, if required */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Size of the batch being tested */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the inspector belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the inspector within the company */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the inspector's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consumer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "dessert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dessert being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feedback is public or private */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the user purchased the dessert */,
  "purchase_location" TEXT /* Location where the user purchased the dessert */,
  "usage_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency with which the user consumes the dessert (e.g., Daily, Weekly, Monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_consumer_feedback_dessert_id FOREIGN KEY ("dessert_id") REFERENCES desserts ("dessert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., consumer, employee) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences or dietary restrictions */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
